get.summary:
Entry detail WITHOUT edit history.
The Auth Service decides who has permission to hit this route

Entry detail WITH the full append-only edit history on each item.
The Auth Service decides who has permission to hit this route

List entries for a specific store. The {store_id} in the URL is the store_number
the frontend sends; we resolve it to the internal integer id

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

patch.summary:
Edit an entry item's counts.
Requires a reason (min 5 chars). Every edit is logged — history is append-only and never deleted.
Accessible to `store_manager` and `inventory_specialist` roles

get.summary: List inventory items with units and stores. Pass ?active=true|false to filter by status

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

post.summary:
Create a new inventory item.
Accepts multipart/form-data when uploading an image (jpg/jpeg/png, max 2MB)

get.summary: Get a single inventory item by ID

put.summary:
Update an existing inventory item.
Pass a new image file to replace the existing one

delete.summary:
Hard-delete an inventory item. Only succeeds if the item was never used
(no entries, no links); otherwise returns 422. For normal use, deactivate instead

patch.summary: Activate or deactivate an item. Body: { "is_active": true|false }

post.summary:
Generate one inventory link per selected store user.
Returns the list of created links (each with its own token)

get.summary: Get a single inventory link by ID

List links for a specific store. The {store_id} in the URL is the store_number
the frontend sends; we resolve it to the internal integer id

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.summary:
Load the public inventory form for a given token.
Returns 404 if the token is invalid.
Returns 410 Gone if the link has already been submitted.
No authentication required

message.const: This link has already been submitted.

post.summary:
Submit inventory counts for a public link.
Returns 404 if token is invalid.
Returns 410 Gone if already submitted — the link expires immediately on first submission.
No authentication required

message.const: This link has already been submitted.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.summary: Get a single inventory unit by ID, including how many items reference it

delete.summary:
Delete an inventory unit.
Returns 422 if the unit is referenced by any items

unit_2_id.description: Second unit is optional; if present it must differ from unit_1 and needs a ratio.

unit_3_id.description: Third unit only makes sense when a second unit exists (unit_3 converts into unit_2).

store_ids.description: Frontend sends store_numbers, not internal ids.

store_id.description: Value is a store_number, not the internal id.

lang.description: Language the public form will display item names/details in.

employee_ids.description: The employees (counters) the manager picked — one link per employee.

unit_2_id.description: Second unit is optional; if present it must differ from unit_1 and needs a ratio.

store_ids.description: Frontend sends store_numbers, not internal ids.

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
